metadata.website_type: informational website for dubai bank codes

tasks.name: Find and copy the SWIFT code for a specific Dubai bank branch
tasks.description: Locate the exact branch page for 'Emirates NBD - Bur Dubai Main Branch' and use the site controls to copy its primary SWIFT/BIC code to the clipboard.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Bank & Branch Search' option in the main navigation menu.
Click into the search input labeled 'Search by bank or branch'.
Type 'Emirates NBD Bur Dubai Main Branch' into the search field.
Use the 'City' filter dropdown to select 'Dubai'.
Use the 'Service type' filter dropdown to select 'Retail banking'.
Click the 'Search' button below the filters.
In the results table, click the branch name row that exactly matches 'Emirates NBD - Bur Dubai Main Branch'.
On the branch details page, scroll down to the section labeled 'SWIFT / BIC code'.
Click the 'Copy SWIFT code' button next to the primary SWIFT/BIC code.

tasks.name: Save the cheapest Dubai Islamic Bank branch for international transfers under 20 AED
tasks.description: Filter all Dubai Islamic Bank branches by outgoing international transfer fee, limit fees to 20 AED or less, then sort and save the branch with the lowest fee to favorites.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Compare fees' option in the main navigation to open the fee comparison page.
In the 'Bank name' filter dropdown, select 'Dubai Islamic Bank'.
In the 'Fee type' filter, choose 'Outgoing international transfer'.
In the numeric field labeled 'Max fee (AED)', type '20'.
Click the 'Apply filters' button to update the branch list.
Open the 'Sort branches by' dropdown and select 'Transfer fee (low to high)'.
In the sorted results, click the first branch row where the displayed transfer fee is 20 AED or less.
On the chosen branch details page, click the 'Add to favorites' or 'Save branch' button to mark it as your selected low-fee branch.

tasks.name: Find a late-opening corporate branch in Dubai Marina and copy its routing code
tasks.description: Locate a corporate banking branch in Dubai Marina that closes at or after 8:00 PM and copy its local routing/branch code.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Branch Locator' link in the header navigation.
Open the 'Area' dropdown and select 'Dubai Marina'.
Open the 'Services' filter panel and check the box for 'Corporate banking'.
Click the 'More filters' option and in the 'Closing time' dropdown choose 'After 8:00 PM'.
Click the 'Show branches' button to display matching branches.
In the results list, identify the branch that shows the latest closing time and click that branch row to open its details page.
On the branch details page, scroll down to the section labeled 'Routing / Local branch code'.
Click the 'Copy routing code' button next to the main routing or branch code.

tasks.name: Validate an IBAN and retrieve the SWIFT code of its Deira branch
tasks.description: Use the IBAN validator tool to check a specific IBAN, navigate from the result to the associated bank, then open a Deira branch and copy its SWIFT code.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'IBAN Tools' item in the main navigation.
On the tools page, click the 'IBAN Validator' option.
In the IBAN input field, type 'AE070331234567890123456'.
Click the 'Validate IBAN' button.
In the validation results panel, click the linked bank name shown for this IBAN.
On the bank overview page, scroll to the branch list and click the first branch whose area label includes 'Deira'.
On that branch detail page, scroll to the 'SWIFT / BIC code' section.
Click the 'Copy SWIFT code' button next to the main SWIFT/BIC code.

tasks.name: Compare USD transfer cut-off times in Deira and save the earlier one
tasks.description: Find Deira branches that handle USD transfers for Emirates NBD and Mashreq Bank, compare their USD transfer cut-off times side by side, and save the branch with the earlier cut-off time.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Branch Locator' option in the main navigation.
Use the 'Area' filter to select 'Deira'.
Open the 'Currency' multi-select filter and select 'USD'.
Click the 'Show branches' button to list USD-capable branches in Deira.
In the results, tick the selection checkbox next to the first branch whose bank name includes 'Emirates NBD'.
Tick the selection checkbox next to the first branch whose bank name includes 'Mashreq Bank'.
Click the 'Compare selected (2)' button to open the comparison view.
On the comparison page, locate the row labeled 'USD transfer cut-off time' and click the 'Save branch' button under the column that shows the earlier cut-off time between the two branches.

tasks.name: Add two First Abu Dhabi Bank branches supporting both EUR and USD to a comparison list
tasks.description: Filter First Abu Dhabi Bank branches in Dubai that support both EUR and USD international transfers, then add the first two results to the comparison view.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Branch Locator' link in the header.
In the 'Bank name' dropdown, select 'First Abu Dhabi Bank'.
In the 'Currency' multi-select filter, select both 'EUR' and 'USD'.
Click the 'Show branches' button to display branches that support the selected currencies.
In the results list, click the 'Add to compare' button on the first branch in the list.
Click the 'Add to compare' button on the second branch in the list.
Click the 'View comparison (2)' button that appears at the bottom or side of the page.
On the comparison page, scroll down to the row labeled 'International transfer currencies' to view both branches side by side.

tasks.name: Bookmark a guide explaining Dubai IBAN structure with reading time under 10 minutes
tasks.description: Find an educational article about Dubai IBAN structure with an estimated reading time of 10 minutes or less and add it to your reading list using the bookmark feature.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Guides & FAQs' option in the main navigation.
On the guides page, click the filter tag labeled 'IBAN basics'.
From the filtered article list, click the first article whose title contains 'Dubai IBAN structure' and whose displayed reading time is '10 min' or less.
Within the article, use the table of contents to click the section link labeled 'Example: Dubai account format'.
Scroll down through the article content until the subsection header 'Sample IBAN breakdown' is positioned near the top of the content area.
Scroll back to the top of the article and click the 'Bookmark this guide' button near the title.
In the bookmark dialog, click the 'Save to reading list' button without changing any default options.

tasks.name: Submit a correction request for an incorrect branch code
tasks.description: Open the details page for 'ABC Bank - Jumeirah Branch' and submit an issue report specifying that the branch code should end with 789 instead of 798, marking the urgency as medium and requesting a copy of the report.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Branch Locator' item in the main navigation.
In the search field, type 'ABC Bank Jumeirah Branch' and press Enter to search.
In the search results list, click the branch row labeled 'ABC Bank - Jumeirah Branch'.
On the branch details page, click the link or button labeled 'Report an issue with these details'.
In the issue form, fill the 'Name' field with 'Test User' and the 'Email' field with 'user@example.com'.
Open the 'Issue type' dropdown and select 'Incorrect branch code'.
In the description text area, type 'The branch code should end with 789 instead of 798.'.
In the 'Urgency' options, select 'Medium (response within 3 days)' and tick the checkbox labeled 'Send me a copy of this report'.
Click the 'Submit issue' button at the bottom of the form.

entities.name: Bank

entities.name: BranchIssueReport
